query: Find VPs of engineering at Stripe.
notes: Happy path. Must call sales_nav_resolve to translate 'Stripe' -> org_id, then sales_nav_search with persist_artifact:true and a conversation_id. Default count: 25.

query: I just ran a sales nav search for 'staff engineers at Anthropic' and got back 187 leads. Narrow it to NYC only.
notes: Refinement = NEW search, not a get_artifact filter. The skill body explicitly says refining filters produces a new artifact_id.

query: Show me the next 25 leads from artifact_id art_abc123.
notes: Pagination of an existing result set goes through get_artifact, not a new sales_nav_search.

query: Find VPs at Stripe. (Note: my powerset-search MCP is not installed yet.)
notes: If the MCP is missing, the skill must route the user through $powerset login first. It must NOT pretend to call sales_nav_search.

query: For the Brookfield Sales Nav run we just loaded, show me people with real estate exposure.
notes: Qualitative refinement over an existing Sales Nav run should score local leads, not run a fresh upstream Sales Nav search.

query: Who is on the investment team or an investor in Dartmouth endowment?
must_not_include: manual MCP chain without the orchestrator
notes: Robust recall path. Resolve Dartmouth to the parent company, run finance/investment, company-only, and past-company search plan items through the orchestrator before any keyword-only fallback, enrich lead artifacts, resolve mutual URLs locally, then score locally against the investment/endowment criteria.

query: Lead 12345 has mutual_member_ids [67890, 11111, 22222] from a previous search. Show me their LinkedIn URLs.
notes: Cheap URL resolution path. Must NOT use enrich_extended_profiles (which costs paid API calls per id) for a simple URL lookup.
